name: Your Name

about: Passionate developer with expertise in modern web technologies. I love crafting performant, accessible, and visually polished applications that make a real impact.

projects.title: Portfolio Website
projects.description: A personal portfolio built with React, GSAP animations, and Tailwind CSS, deployed on GitHub Pages.

projects.title: Task Manager App
projects.description: A full-stack task management application with real-time updates and collaborative boards.

projects.title: Weather Dashboard
projects.description: An interactive weather dashboard that visualizes forecast data with dynamic charts and maps.

experience.desc: Led the redesign of the customer-facing dashboard, improving load times by 40% and increasing user engagement.
Built reusable component libraries and contributed to the migration from a legacy codebase to React.
Assisted in building responsive websites for clients across e-commerce, healthcare, and education sectors.
